mapper.sql: id, name, dept_id, division, start_date, end_date, lec_type, lec_level, related_subject, lecturer, lecturer_name, lecturer_unit, lecturer_duty, lecturer_title, lecturer_info, lec_address, lecturer_listener, listeners_num, compere, commend, check_status, intro, operate_time, creator_id, creator_name, create_time, sub_flag, sub_user_id, sub_date, sub_time
mapper.select:
select sale.id as rowId , sale.name as name,sale.sub_flag as subFlag,sale.start_date as startDate, cslt.code as "lecType.id",cslt.name as "lecType.name",cslt.name as lecTypeName,csll.code as "lecLevel.id",csll.name as "lecLevel.name",csll.name as lecLevelName, sdept.id as "deptId.id",sdept.name as "deptId.name",sdept.name as deptName,ddept.id as "division.id",ddept.name as "division.name", sale.lec_address as lecAddress,sale.intro as intro,sale.listeners_num as listenersNum, luser.id as "lecturer.id",luser.name as "lecturer.name",luser.name as lecturerName,sale.check_status, csru.code as "lecturerUnit.id",csru.name as "lecturerUnit.name",sale.lecturer_duty as lecturerDuty, ccsti.code as "lecturerTitle.id",ccsti.name as "lecturerTitle.name",ccsti.name as lecturerTitleName,sale.lecturer_info as lecturerInfo, fdiscipline.code as "relatedSubject.id",fdiscipline.name as "relatedSubject.name",fdiscipline.name as "relatedSubjectName", sale.compere as compere,sale.commend as commend,sale.create_time,luser1.name as creatorName,sale.operate_time
from srm_ac_lecture sale left join ct_srm_lecture_level csll on csll.code=sale.lec_level left join ct_srm_lecture_type cslt on cslt.code=sale.lec_type left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sale.dept_id left join ct_srm_dept ddept on ddept.id=sale.division left join ct_srm_user luser on luser.id=sale.lecturer left join ct_srm_user luser1 on luser1.id=sale.creator_id left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sale.lecturer_unit left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=sale.lecturer_title left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sale.related_subject where sale.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_ac_lecture
sub_flag = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
